title: `Unniy #6042
definition:
Unni = "afflicted"

 1) a Levite doorkeeper in the time of David
 2) a Levite concerned in the sacred office after the return from
    exile in Babylon
nasbUsage:
Definition: Unni = "afflicted"

 1) a Levite doorkeeper in the time of David
 2) a Levite concerned in the sacred office after the return from
    exile in Babylon

    NASB:  two Levites
